specific_mechanism: RICCI-BASIN: Ricci-flow-curvature signature as loss-landscape basin identifier
llm_application: Estimate Ricci curvature of local loss landscape via Hessian eigenvalue distribution; track curvature flow through training to identify basin transitions; predict generalization from basin curvature.
novelty_claim: Distinct from R691 Sobolev basin width and R698 Banach contraction — uses Ricci-curvature signature.
